ddls:
CREATE TABLE "event_top_advs" (
  "event_top_adv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each top-level event control */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific event */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of event control */,
  "value_1" INTEGER /* First value associated with the event control */,
  "value_2" INTEGER /* Second value associated with the event control */,
  "value_3" INTEGER /* Third value associated with the event control */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the story associated with the event */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Character ID related to the event */,
  "condition_type" INTEGER /* Type of condition for the event */,
  "condition_story_id" INTEGER /* Story ID for the condition */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time for the event control */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time for the event control */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event control was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event control was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_top_adv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_top_advs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_top_advs_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_top_advs_condition_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_story_id") REFERENCES stories ("story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_top_advs_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES stories ("story_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" INTEGER /* Type of event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., 'Upcoming', 'Active', 'Completed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength attribute of the character */,
  "agility" INTEGER /* Agility attribute of the character */,
  "intelligence" INTEGER /* Intelligence attribute of the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stories" (
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each story */,
  "story_name" TEXT /* Name of the story */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the story */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the story was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the story was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("story_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_type" INTEGER /* Type of condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the story associated with the condition */,
  "required_level" INTEGER /* Required character level to meet the condition */,
  "required_attributes" TEXT /* Required character attributes to meet the condition (e.g., strength, agility, intelligence) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's progress */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player's progress (e.g., 'In Progress', 'Completed') */,
  "completion_time" TEXT /* Time when the player completed the event */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the player */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the player's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_progress_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_progress_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the game */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the player's last login */,
  "total_score" INTEGER /* Total score achieved by the player */,
  "total_rating" INTEGER /* Total rating given to the player's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event associated with the reward */,
  "reward_name" TEXT /* Name of the reward */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., 'Item', 'Currency', 'Experience') */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_rewards" (
  "player_reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward received by a player */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward */,
  "receive_time" TEXT /* Time when the player received the reward */,
  "used_time" TEXT /* Time when the player used the reward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rewards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rewards_reward_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_id") REFERENCES rewards ("reward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "event_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event participant */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "join_time" TEXT /* Time when the player joined the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_leaderboards" (
  "event_leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event leaderboard entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player in the leaderboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_leaderboards_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_leaderboards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_notifications" (
  "event_notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., 'Event Start', 'Event End', 'Reward') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_notifications_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
